title: 23 Upcoming Dividend Increases Including 2 Kings
text: All stocks have at least five fiscal years of dividend growth history and come from the U.S. Dividend Champions List. They have an average and median increase of 8.0%.

title: 4 Solid Stocks to Buy as Durable Goods Orders Continue to Rise
text: Continued demand for durable goods is driving orders, helping stocks like Hubbell Incorporated (HUBB), Applied Industrial Technologies (AIT), IDEX Corporation (IEX) and Manitex International (MNTX).

title: 4 Solid Stocks to Buy on Rise in September Factory Orders
text: Continued demand for goods is driving orders at U.S. factories, helping stocks like Applied Industrial Technologies (AIT), Standex International (SXI), Hubbell (HUBB) and Twin Disc (TWIN).

title: 4 Solid Stocks to Buy on Rise in September Durable Goods Orders
text: Continued demand for durable goods is driving orders, which is helping stocks like Graham Corporation (GHM), Hubbell Incorporated (HUBB), AZZ Inc. (AZZ) and Twin Disc, Incorporated (TWIN).
